![Image 31](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api)

[Dashboard](https://serpapi.com/dashboard)[Sign Out](https://serpapi.com/users/sign_out)

Google Shopping Light API
=========================

[API uptime 99.444%](https://serpapi.com/status/google_shopping_light)

SerpApi's Google Shopping Light API allows you to scrape the results of a Google Shopping search with lightning-fast speeds. The Google Shopping Light engine contains all the most critical data, but without the extra-rich results you usually find on a regular Google Shopping page. This allows for faster response times compared to our regular [Google Shopping API](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-api).

The API endpoint is `https://serpapi.com/search?engine=google_shopping_light`

 Head to the [playground](https://serpapi.com/playground?engine=google_shopping_light) for a live and interactive demo.

![Image 32: Chart](https://serpapi.com/assets/google_shopping_light/chart-f07bbf88d1b306321b3898ea5c999d38327727c5f95b00926381da83d5d8aa3a.jpg)

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#documentation-demo)

q Search Query

GET

*    
```url
https://serpapi.com/search.json?engine=google_shopping_light&q=macbook
```

Code to integrate

cURL Ruby Python JavaScript Go PHP Java Rust.NET Google Sheets

*   [](https://github.com/serpapi/serpapi-ruby)[](https://rubygems.org/gems/serpapi) 
```ruby
require "serpapi" 

client = SerpApi::Client.new(
  engine: "google_shopping_light",
  q: "macbook",
  api_key: "secret_api_key"
)

results = client.search
shopping_results = results[:shopping_results]
```

Free Plan · 250 searches / month

[Get started](https://serpapi.com/users/sign_up?plan=free)

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters) API Parameters
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-search-query) Search Query

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-search-query-q)

q

Required

Parameter defines the query you want to search. You can use anything that you would use in a regular Google Shopping search.

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-geographic-location) Geographic Location

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-geographic-location-location)

location

Optional

Parameter defines from where you want the search to originate. If several locations match the location requested, we'll pick the most popular one. Head to the [/locations.json API](https://serpapi.com/locations-api) if you need more precise control. The location and uule parameters can't be used together. It is recommended to specify location at the city level in order to simulate a real user’s search. If location is omitted, the search may take on the location of the proxy.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-geographic-location-uule)

uule

Optional

Parameter is the Google encoded location you want to use for the search. uule and location parameters can't be used together.

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-localization) Localization

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-localization-google-domain)

google_domain

Optional

Parameter defines the Google domain to use. It defaults to `google.com`. Head to the [Google domains](https://serpapi.com/google-domains) for a full list of supported Google domains.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-localization-gl)

gl

Optional

Parameter defines the country to use for the Google search. It's a two-letter country code. (e.g., `us` for the United States, `uk` for United Kingdom, or `fr` for France) Head to the [Google Shopping countries](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-countries) for a full list of supported Google countries.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-localization-hl)

hl

Optional

Parameter defines the language to use for the Google Shopping search. It's a two-letter language code. (e.g., `en` for English, `es` for Spanish, or `fr` for French) Head to the Google languages for a full list of supported [Google languages](https://serpapi.com/google-languages).

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters) Advanced Filters

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-shoprs)

shoprs

Optional

The parameter defines the token that includes metadata about query and search filter(s). Providing q parameter alongside the shoprs is **not** required.

To apply multiple filters join them with `||` separator, e.g. `shoprs_1||shoprs_2||shoprs_3`.

Values for this parameter are not available through the Google Shopping Light API. You can use our [Google Shopping API](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-api) to retrieve the values, or you can visit the Google Shopping website directly, set filters you want and simply copy shoprs value from their URL to SerpApi URL.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-min-price)

min_price

Optional

Lower bound of price range query.

This parameter overrides corresponding filter embedded into shoprs parameter.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-max-price)

max_price

Optional

Upper bound of price range query.

This parameter overrides corresponding filter embedded into shoprs parameter.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-sort-by)

sort_by

Optional

Parameter defines the sorting order of the results.

Available options:

`1` - Price: low to high

`2` - Price: high to low

This parameter overrides corresponding filter embedded into shoprs parameter.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-free-shipping)

free_shipping

Optional

Show only products with free shipping.

This parameter overrides corresponding filter embedded into shoprs parameter.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-on-sale)

on_sale

Optional

Show only products that are on sale.

This parameter overrides corresponding filter embedded into shoprs parameter.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-advanced-filters-small-business)

small_business

Optional

Show only products from small business.

This parameter overrides corresponding filter embedded into shoprs parameter.

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-pagination) Pagination

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-pagination-start)

start

Optional

Parameter defines the result offset. It skips the given number of results. It's used for pagination. (e.g., `0` (default) is the first page of results, `10` is the 2nd page of results, `20` is the 3rd page of results, etc.).

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters)![Image 33](https://serpapi.com/assets/square-logo-v3-small.png) Serpapi Parameters

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-engine)

engine

Required

Set parameter to `google_shopping_light` to use the Google Shopping Light API engine.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-device)

device

Optional

Parameter defines the device to use to get the results. It can be set to `desktop` (default) to use a regular browser, `tablet` to use a tablet browser (currently using iPads), or `mobile` to use a mobile browser.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-no-cache)

no_cache

Optional

Parameter will force SerpApi to fetch the Google Shopping Light results even if a cached version is already present. A cache is served only if the query and all parameters are exactly the same. Cache expires after 1h. Cached searches are free, and are not counted towards your searches per month. It can be set to `false` (default) to allow results from the cache, or `true` to disallow results from the cache. no_cache and async parameters should not be used together.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-async)

async

Optional

Parameter defines the way you want to submit your search to SerpApi. It can be set to `false` (default) to open an HTTP connection and keep it open until you got your search results, or `true` to just submit your search to SerpApi and retrieve them later. In this case, you'll need to use our [Searches Archive API](https://serpapi.com/search-archive-api) to retrieve your results. async and no_cache parameters should not be used together. async should not be used on accounts with [Ludicrous Speed](https://serpapi.com/plan) enabled.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-zero-trace)

zero_trace

Optional

Enterprise only. Parameter enables [ZeroTrace mode](https://serpapi.com/zero-trace-mode). It can be set to `false` (default) or `true`. Enable this mode to skip storing search parameters, search files, and search metadata on our servers. This may make debugging more difficult.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-api-key)

api_key

Required

Parameter defines the SerpApi private key to use.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-output)

output

Optional

Parameter defines the final output you want. It can be set to json (default) to get a structured `JSON` of the results, or `html` to get the raw html retrieved.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-parameters-serpapi-parameters-json-restrictor)

json_restrictor

Optional

Parameter defines the fields you want to restrict in the outputs for smaller, faster responses. See [JSON Restrictor](https://serpapi.com/json-restrictor) for more details.

[](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-results) API Results
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-results-json-results) JSON Results

JSON output includes structured data for [shopping results](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-results), [inline shopping results](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-inline-results), and popular [categories](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-categorized-shopping-results).

A search status is accessible through `search_metadata.status`. It flows this way: `Processing` ->`Success` || `Error`. If a search has failed, `error` will contain an error message. `search_metadata.id` is the search ID inside SerpApi.

### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-results-html-results) HTML Results

HTML output is useful to debug JSON results or support features not supported yet by SerpApi. HTML output gives you the raw HTML results from Google.

*    
```url
https://serpapi.com/search.json?engine=google_shopping_light&q=macbook
```

cURL Ruby Python JavaScript Go PHP Java Rust.NET Google Sheets

```ruby
require "serpapi" 

client = SerpApi::Client.new(
  engine: "google_shopping_light",
  q: "macbook",
  api_key: "secret_api_key"
)

results = client.search
```


### [](https://serpapi.com/google-shopping-light-api#api-examples-json-structure-overview) JSON structure overview

```json
{
  "inline_shopping_results": [
    {
      "position": "Integer - Item position (Ex: 1)",
      "block_position": "String - Block position on the page. Value can be `top` or `bottom`",
      "title": "String - Item title",
      "price": "String - Item price (Ex : '$14.99')",
      "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item price as a float or integer (Ex: '14.99')".,
      "old_price": "String - Item's price before discount (Ex: '$15.99')",
      "extracted_old_price": "Numeric - Item's old price as float or integer (Ex: '15.99')",
      "installment": {
        "price": "String - Monthly installment price of the item",
        "extracted_price": "Float - Monthly installment price as a float",
        "period": "Integer - Number of months",
      },
      "delivery": "String - Delivery price information of the item",
      "second_hand_condition": "String - Description of condition when the product is second hand (Ex: 'used', or 'refurbished')",
      "link": "String - Direct link to the Google item page",
      "tracking_link": "String - Google ad tracking link",
      "source": "String - Product source name (Ex: 'Black Rifle Coffee Company')",
      "rating": "Numeric - Item rating (Ex: '4.5')",
      "reviews": "Integer - Item review count (Ex: '1200')",
      "extensions": "Array - Item's extensions",
      "thumbnail": "String - URL of an image",
      "serpapi_thumbnail": "String - URL of the image served by SerpApi"
    },
  ],
  "shopping_results": [
    {
      "position": "Integer - Item position",
      "title": "String - Item title",
      "product_link": "String - Link to the Google item page",
      "product_id": "String - Unique Google product identifier",
      "immersive_product_page_token": "String - Product Token for in Search API Google Immersive Product API",
      "serpapi_immersive_product_api": "String - SerpApi URL to fetch more information about this specific product via Google Immersive Product API",
      "source": "String - Product source name",
      "source_icon": "String - Link to the source icon",
      "price": "String - Item price",
      "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item's price as float or integer",
      "installment": {
        "price": "String - Monthly installment price of the item",
        "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item's installment price as float or integer",
        "period": "Integer - Number of months",
      },
      "alternative_price": {
        "price": "String - Price of an item in alternative currency",
        "currency": "String - Currency of an item",
        "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item's price as float or integer" 
      },
      "old_price": "String - Item's price before discount (Ex: '$15.99')",
      "extracted_old_price": "Numeric - Item's old price as float or integer (Ex: '15.99')",
      "delivery": "String - Delivery price information of the item",
      "second_hand_condition": "String - Description of condition when the product is second hand (Ex: 'used', or 'refurbished')",
      "rating": "Float - Item rating",
      "reviews": "Integer - Item review count",
      "snippet": "String - Item description",
      "extensions": "Array - Item tags/extensions",
      "thumbnail": "String - URL of an image",
      "thumbnails": "Array - Multiple Image URL of the product",
      "serpapi_thumbnail": "String - High Resolution URL of an image",
      "serpapi_thumbnails": "Array - Multiple High Resolution Image URLs of the product",
      "multiple_sources": "True - If more than one seller available",
      "tag": "String - Item tag ex: CURBSIDE, IN-STORE PICKUP, SALE, or FREE 2-DAY",
      "badge": "String - Seller's Extra Information eg: Small business",
    },
    ...
  ],
  "categorized_shopping_results": [
    {
      "title": "String - Title of the category",
      "description": "String - Description of the category",
      "shopping_results": [
        {
          "position": "Integer - Item position",
          "title": "String - Item title",
          "product_link": "String - Link to the Google item page",
          "product_id": "String - Unique Google product identifier",
          "immersive_product_page_token": "String - Product Token for in Search API Google Immersive Product API",
          "serpapi_immersive_product_api": "String - SerpApi URL to fetch more information about this specific product via Google Immersive Product API",
          "source": "String - Product source name",
          "source_icon": "String - Link to the source icon",
          "price": "String - Item price",
          "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item's price as float or integer",
          "installment": {
            "price": "String - Monthly installment price of the item",
            "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item's installment price as float or integer",
            "period": "Integer - Number of months",
          },
          "alternative_price": {
            "price": "String - Price of an item in alternative currency",
            "currency": "String - Currency of an item",
            "extracted_price": "Numeric - Item's price as float or integer" 
          },
          "old_price": "String - Item's price before discount (Ex: '$15.99')",
          "extracted_old_price": "Numeric - Item's old price as float or integer (Ex: '15.99')",
          "delivery": "String - Delivery price information of the item",
          "second_hand_condition": "String - Description of condition when the product is second hand (Ex: 'used', or 'refurbished')",
          "rating": "Float - Item rating",
          "reviews": "Integer - Item review count",
          "snippet": "String - Item description",
          "extensions": "Array - Item tags/extensions",
          "thumbnail": "String - URL of an image",
          "serpapi_thumbnail": "String - High Resolution URL of an image",
          "multiple_sources": "True - If more than one seller available",
          "tag": "String - Item tag ex: CURBSIDE, IN-STORE PICKUP, SALE, or FREE 2-DAY",
          "badge": "String - Seller's Extra Information eg: Small business",
        },
        ...
      ],
    },
    ...
  ],
  "serpapi_pagination": {
    "next": "String - SerpApi link for paginating to the next page of results",
  },
}
```
